Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Jiangsu Tongwei Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Tongwei Technology Co., Ltd. is a highly deceptive specimen of a 'building weak current engineering and security sub-contractor.' The official commercial system categorized it under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' because its license is stacked with terms like 'manufacturing of power distribution switch control equipment' and 'manufacturing of digital video surveillance systems.' However, the forensic probe directly revealed its true commercial baseline: this is a physical enterprise with a registered capital up to 50 million, 17.05 million paid-in, and 25 insured employees. Its most core flaw lies in its registered address: 'Room 1903,' No. 26 Zhongshan North Road, Gulou District, Nanjing City. On the 19th floor of a downtown high-rise office building, it is absolutely impossible to open a manufacturing plant for security equipment and distribution switches. Looking again at the 'permitted items' on its business license, the truth comes to light: construction engineering, intelligent building system design, construction labor subcontracting. This is fundamentally not an equipment manufacturing plant! This is a typical System Integrator & Construction Contractor for building weak current engineering, security surveillance integration, and municipal landscaping. They lead 25 employees to take on weak current wiring, install surveillance cameras, and manage residential landscaping. The 'manufacturing' terms in the license are purely to meet the qualification requirements for 'manufacturer direct supply' or issuing hardware equipment invoices during engineering bidding.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 70)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / ENGINEERING CONTRACTOR & INTEGRATOR
